header.subtitle: Privacy-first HIV pharmaceutical care support tool for pilot clinical workflows, explainable scoring, and AI-assisted text intake.

progress.title: Workflow completion
progress.subtitle: Track how much of the CMO-VIH stratification dataset has been completed.

dashboard.title: Pilot workflow overview
dashboard.empty: Complete manual fields, paste clinical text, or import a record to generate a summary.

inputs.textPlaceholder: Paste de-identified clinical text here. The AI module extracts structured variables, marks extracted vs inferred data, and leaves unknown items missing.
inputs.importPlaceholder: Paste a JSON object or a one-line CSV file with matching field IDs.
inputs.futureIntegration: Prepared for future EHR connectors through the shared case schema. No live integration is implemented in this static version.
inputs.importEmpty: Paste JSON or CSV content before importing.

options.hospitalNone: No hospitalization in the last 6 months
options.hospitalRecent: 1 or more hospitalizations in the last 6 months

priority1: Validate ART and comorbidity therapy immediately.
Perform adherence review with intensive reinforcement.
Coordinate multidisciplinary review for high-risk flags.
Assess digital, psychosocial, and frailty barriers during the same workflow.
priority2: Address adherence barriers and education needs.
Optimize comorbidity control with coordinated follow-up.
Monitor psychosocial changes and care access barriers.
priority3: Reassess stratification when new risks appear.

explainability.title: Explainability panel
explainability.empty: Run the engine to display score contributions and rationale.
explainability.autoLevel: Automatic classification based on explicit rules: {level}.
explainability.overrideApplied: Clinician override applied. Final level set to {level}.
explainability.noOverride: No clinician override is currently applied.

ai.title: AI-assisted intake
ai.instructions: The AI module extracts structured variables from pasted text, labels each finding as extracted or inferred, and never fills undocumented values.
ai.summaryDetected: The text-processing module populated {count} structured variables while leaving unresolved variables as missing.
ai.summaryNone: No structured variables could be extracted confidently from the pasted text.
ai.analysisComplete: AI-assisted extraction completed. Human validation remains required.

override.title: Clinician override
override.reasonPlaceholder: Document why the deterministic result was adjusted.

exports.title: Outputs and exports
exports.ready: Exports are ready. Use the buttons above to download structured deliverables.
exports.pending: Run the engine to enable outputs.

settings.title: Workflow settings
settings.patientLabelHelp: Use pseudonymized labels only. Avoid names, initials, record numbers, dates of birth, or other direct identifiers.

legal.clinicalDisclaimer: Clinical decision support only — not a substitute for clinician judgment.
legal.aiDisclaimer: AI-assisted extraction may contain errors and requires human validation.
legal.privacyDisclaimer: Privacy-first design — no personal identifiers are required.
legal.regulatoryDisclaimer: Not a certified medical device; intended for research, support, and pilot use.
legal.ipDisclaimer: CMO-VIH Pro v2 — March 2026. All rights reserved. No reproduction without permission.

footer.sectionTitle: Scientific foundation and clinical use framework
footer.sectionIntro: CMO-VIH Pro v2 is presented as a structured end layer for scientific positioning, prudent legal framing, and visible authorship within a modern clinical workflow interface.
footer.aboutBody: CMO-VIH Pro v2 — March 2026 is a digital support system for pharmaceutical stratification in people living with HIV, based on the CMO model (Capacity, Motivation, and Opportunity) and designed for pilot support, applied research, and scalable AI-enabled evolution.
footer.scientificBody: This digital tool is grounded in the CMO pharmaceutical care model and in published clinical evidence on its impact in people living with HIV. It builds on the work of Ramón Morillo-Verdugo and collaborators and reflects a model with documented clinical impact in this population.
footer.scientificReferenceTitle: Clinical Impact of the Capacity-Motivation-Opportunity Pharmacist-Led Intervention in People Living with HIV in Spain, 2019–2020.
footer.scientificReferenceMeta: Morillo-Verdugo R, Robustillo-Cortés MA, et al. · Journal of Multidisciplinary Healthcare · 2022
footer.authorshipBody: The authorship is intentionally explicit to preserve scientific continuity between the conceptual CMO framework, its translation into digital workflows, and its future methodological expansion.
footer.disclaimerBody: This is a clinical support tool only. It does not replace professional judgment, and any output should be interpreted by a qualified healthcare professional within the full clinical context.
footer.privacyBody: The application is structured for privacy-conscious use and methodological work, supporting local browser-based operation, pseudonymized datasets, and export-oriented research workflows when appropriate.
footer.privacyPointLocal: Browser-based local processing architecture in this static version.
footer.privacyPointPseudonymized: Use pseudonymized or de-identified data whenever possible.
footer.privacyPointResearch: Suitable for research methodology, structured exports, and pilot analytics.
footer.ipBody: This content, structure, and presentation layer remain protected intellectual property. Reproduction, distribution, transformation, or reuse without prior authorization is not permitted.

newCase.title: Do you want to start a new patient?
newCase.prompt: Choose how to open a fresh case. You can save the current case to local storage before clearing the workflow, or continue without saving it.
newCase.saveAndCreate: Save current case and create new
newCase.savedMessage: Current case saved locally as {id}. A fresh case is now ready.

savedCases.title: Saved Cases / Casos guardados
savedCases.empty: No saved cases match the current filters.
savedCases.helperStorage: Saved cases stay only on this device in {storage}. No server backend is used.
savedCases.helperPrivacy: Use pseudonymized labels only and avoid direct personal identifiers in saved cases.
savedCases.confirmDelete: Delete saved case {caseId} from this browser?
savedCases.updateMissing: This case has not been saved before. Use “Save case” or “Save as new case” first.
